title: Add SDLC stage handoffs to implementing agents
description: Add `handoffs` field to all implementing agents for SDLC stage transitions. Each agent gets a handoff to the next stage in the pipeline (Backend→QA, QA→Security, Security→CI, CI→Docs, Docs→Validation). This creates a native workflow chain.
acceptance_criteria: Given Backend.agent.md includes `handoffs`, when Backend completes, then a "Run QA" handoff button appears pointing to QA agent
Given each agent has handoffs, then the full chain is: implementing→QA→Security→CI→Docs→Validation
Given handoff prompts include ticket ID context, when clicked, then the next agent receives the ticket ID
